title: Talos
image: https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/6a3b8df8-d1dc-4725-9e1b-c51aa1466214/d5xgv14-4a615bb0-9fd5-4791-8f30-f1922d9f3af9.jpg?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..rnlRzyIlD_rKbCN2tai_NKPzRwg78-x_tUEJC89doI8
image-source: https://www.deviantart.com/spellsword95/art/Centaur-Warlord-358544920
image2: https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/9c51cb96-c626-4ee4-92c9-e45062e0841d/d4ttdw9-217a705e-eaf2-4137-9c02-8d2e11e1b0d9.jpg/v1/fill/w_800,h_1200,q_75,strp/centaur_warlord_by_sigbjornpedersen_d4ttdw9-fullview.jpg?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ekfbroReWLn31pvneJgTo3k0bvTfR80MDGqwum5VElQ
image2-source: https://www.deviantart.com/sigbjornpedersen/art/Centaur-Warlord-291944601
statbox:
  race: centaur
  gender: male
  tribe: Malosi
  case: "06"
descriptions:
  - session: "06e04"
    content: |
      Malosi chieftain who appeared while the party was transferring tattoos. Revealed himself as a well-muscled centaur with magical bling. Became interested in Cal's sword but backed down when refused.
  - session: "13e03"
    content: |
      Invaded Alye'adu seeking to claim the shapeshifting powers of the changelings, revealing himself as a were-tiger-centaur capable of soul-stealing magic.
  - session: "13e04"
    content: |
      Engaged in fierce combat with the SPI at Alye'adu but was defeated; yielded to the party and revealed they are 'godlings'; invited them to join the Malosi before vanishing with companions.
  - session: "14e00"
    content: |
      Mentioned as a potential threat; discussed in context of the SPI's broader concerns.
  - session: "14e03"
    content: |
      Glimpsed in Freki's memory in the mirror as a centaur who fought and defeated Freki's father; laughed condescendingly at his opponent.
---

Leader of the [Malosi](../orgs/malosi) tribe.
